sources.label: AetherState canonical ActionFrame vertical
sources.note: Existing actor, capability, target, possession, locus, polarity, modality, evidence, and ambiguity contract.

sources.label: AetherState state and extraction vocabularies
sources.note: Preserved body, contact, position, relationship, presence, location, item, and effect authority vocabularies.

sources.label: AetherState Tier-0 semantic vocabularies
sources.note: Preserved body-part, object-part, armament-head, action, target, and referent behavior being migrated into the shared fabric.

sources.label: Berkeley FrameNet
sources.note: Frame-semantic precedent for lexical units, frame elements, and valence rather than unstructured synonym lists.

sources.label: PropBank predicate-argument resource
sources.note: Predicate senses and argument relations used as a compact role-structure reference.

sources.label: Universal Dependencies v2 relation inventory
sources.note: Cross-linguistic distinctions for subjects, objects, obliques, names, compounds, apposition, and modifiers.

sources.label: Universal Dependencies proper-name guidance
sources.note: Distinguishes proper-name tokens, multiword names, acronyms, and compositional named phrases.

sources.label: Universal Dependencies English possessive nominal modifier
sources.note: Separates possessive nominal modifiers from noun compounds and quotative phrases.

sources.label: University of Colorado VerbNet
sources.note: Verb classes described by thematic roles, selection preferences, syntactic frames, and semantic subevents.

sources.label: Princeton WordNet documentation
sources.note: Lexical senses and semantic relations including synonymy, hypernymy, meronymy, and holonymy.
